summary: Iteration 54 - Backend E2E testing of Loyalty Redemption & Promo Codes Coexistence. All 21 tests PASSED. Verified: 1) Customer redeems reward → gets redemption_code → code exists in promo_codes with source='loyalty_redemption'. 2) Redemption code validates correctly via POST /api/promo-codes/validate. 3) After POST /api/promo-codes/use → loyalty_redemptions.status='used' AND promo_codes.is_active=false. 4) Used code cannot be validated again (returns 404 as code deactivated). 5) Admin GET /api/loyalty/admin/promo-codes returns BOTH source='loyalty_reward' AND source='loyalty_redemption' entries. 6) Admin-generated promos work independently. 7) Customer GET /api/loyalty/redemptions shows status='used' with used_in_order. 8) Backwards compatible: Direct POST /api/promo-codes/ still works.

setup_tests.test_02_create_low_points_test_reward: PASS - Created test reward with 10% discount, points_required=10

customer_redemption_flow_tests.test_04_customer_redeems_reward: PASS - Customer redeemed reward, got redemption_code
customer_redemption_flow_tests.test_05_verify_code_in_promo_codes_colle: PASS - Code found with source='loyalty_redemption', redemption_id linked, is_active=true, times_used=0

validation_tests.test_06_validate_redemption_code: PASS - Validates correctly with discount_type=percentage, discount_value=10.0, discount_amount=1000 (10% of 10000)

use_and_status_update_tests.test_09_verify_promo_code_deactivated: PASS - is_active=false, times_used=1 after single use

used_code_rejection_tests.test_10_used_code_validation_fails: PASS - Validation returns 404 (code deactivated after usage_limit reached)

admin_sees_all_sources_tests.test_13_admin_sees_both_sources: PASS - Admin endpoint returns both loyalty_reward and loyalty_redemption codes
admin_sees_all_sources_tests.test_14_admin_generated_promo_works_inde: PASS - Admin promo validates with correct discount

backwards_compatibility_tests.test_15_create_direct_promo_code: PASS - Created promo directly via POST /api/promo-codes/
backwards_compatibility_tests.test_16_validate_direct_promo_code: PASS - Direct promo validates correctly (fixed discount)

code_reuse_prevention_tests.test_20_second_use_of_same_code_fails: PASS - Second use attempt rejected (404 - code deactivated)

cleanup.test_99_cleanup_test_data: PASS - Test rewards and promo codes cleaned up

features_verified.customer_redemption_creates_promo_code: VERIFIED - POST /api/loyalty/redeem/{id} creates entry in BOTH loyalty_redemptions AND promo_codes collections
features_verified.redemption_code_has_correct_source: VERIFIED - promo_codes entry has source='loyalty_redemption', redemption_id linked, redeemed_by set
features_verified.redemption_code_validation: VERIFIED - POST /api/promo-codes/validate returns discount_type, discount_value, discount_amount
features_verified.use_updates_redemption_status: VERIFIED - POST /api/promo-codes/use updates loyalty_redemptions.status='used' and promo_codes.is_active=false
features_verified.used_code_rejected: VERIFIED - Used code returns 404 (deactivated) on validation attempt
features_verified.admin_sees_both_sources: VERIFIED - GET /api/loyalty/admin/promo-codes returns both source='loyalty_reward' and source='loyalty_redemption'
features_verified.customer_redemptions_show_status: VERIFIED - GET /api/loyalty/redemptions shows status='used' with used_in_order after code use
features_verified.backwards_compatibility: VERIFIED - POST /api/promo-codes/ directly still validates and works

critical_code_review_comments: Redemption flow correctly creates dual entries (loyalty_redemptions + promo_codes) with proper linking via redemption_id
Use endpoint correctly updates both collections: increments times_used on promo_codes, sets status='used' on loyalty_redemptions
Admin promo-codes endpoint correctly filters for both sources using $in operator
Note: Used codes return 404 'Invalid promo code' rather than 400 with specific message - this is acceptable as is_active=false makes them effectively invalid
seed_data_creation: Test rewards and promo codes created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 verified full loyalty redemption & promo code coexistence. Key flows: 1) Customer POST /api/loyalty/redeem/{id} → creates entries in BOTH loyalty_redemptions AND promo_codes (source='loyalty_redemption'). 2) Customer validates code via POST /api/promo-codes/validate. 3) After POST /api/promo-codes/use, the /use endpoint updates loyalty_redemptions.status='used' and promo_codes.is_active=false. 4) Admin GET /api/loyalty/admin/promo-codes shows both admin-generated (source='loyalty_reward') and customer-redeemed (source='loyalty_redemption') codes. 5) Direct promo codes via POST /api/promo-codes/ still work (backwards compatibility). All E2E flows verified working correctly.
